payload_policy: No external ontology payloads are read or committed by this registry build.

records.authoritative_endpoint_note: No official public GitHub repository confirmed; use DECIPHER data-access terms.

records.description: Integrate DECIPHER into terminology and translation support
expected_blockers: Only aggregate or public gene/variant/disease evidence may be commit-safe.

records.fallback_path: Keep this as a governance-only track until explicit permitted public surfaces are documented.

commit_safe_artifacts: review pack structure without restricted labels
records.description: Integrate Disease Ontology into terminology and translation support
expected_blockers: Synonym-rich disease records can create high-noise candidate evidence.
English-only labels limit multilingual triangulation value.
records.fallback_path: Use DO for disease context, identifier network edges, and conflict detection.
known_blockers: Disease entities are not phenotype labels and require mapping caveats.
Disease-to-HPO links should prefer curated mappings over text similarity.
records.source_payload_commit_policy: do_not_commit_raw_source_payloads; commit only registry, schemas, provenance, bounded validation summaries, and derived reports after terms review
records.usefulness: Disease normalization and disease-phenotype crosswalk review.

commit_safe_artifacts: review pack structure without restricted labels

records.fallback_path: Use EFO mainly for coverage, external identifier edges, and conflict detection.

Experimental factor semantics may not directly map to phenotypes.
records.source_payload_commit_policy: do_not_commit_raw_source_payloads; commit only registry, schemas, provenance, bounded validation summaries, and derived reports after terms review
